mise.toml:1-39
  1| [tools]
  2| # Please also keep the version aligned in the go.mod file
  3| go = { version = '1.26.2', postinstall = "go install github.com/go-delve/delve/cmd/dlv@latest && go install gotest.tools/gotestsum@latest" }
  4| golangci-lint = '2.11.3'
  5| shellcheck = 'latest'
  6| tmux = 'latest'
  7| "go:github.com/entireio/roger-roger/cmd/roger-roger" = 'latest'
  8| "go:github.com/entireio/roger-roger/cmd/entire-agent-roger-roger" = 'latest'
  9|

mise-tasks/test/e2e/canary:1-68
  1| #!/bin/sh
  2| #MISE description="Run E2E canary tests with deterministic agents (no API calls)"
  3| #USAGE arg "[filter]" help="Test name filter (regex)" default=""
  4| 
  5| set -eu
  6| 
  7| # Build entire CLI
  8| mise run build
  9| export E2E_ENTIRE_BIN="$PWD/entire"
  10| 
  11| # Build vogon binary
  12| go build -o vogon ./e2e/vogon
  13| E2E_PATH="$PWD:$PATH"
  14| 
  15| if [ -z "${E2E_ARTIFACT_DIR:-}" ]; then
  16|   E2E_ARTIFACT_DIR="$PWD/e2e/

mise-tasks/test/ci/core:1-17
  1| #!/bin/sh
  2| #MISE description="Run non-integration Go tests with race detection for CI"
  3| 
  4| set -eu
  5| 
  6| parallel="${GO_TEST_PARALLEL:-16}"
  7| 
  8| packages="$(go list ./... | grep -v '^github.com/entireio/cli/cmd/entire/cli/integration_test$' || true)"
  9| 
  10| if [ -z "$packages" ]; then
  11|   echo "error: no non-integration packages found" >&2
  12|   exit 1
  13| fi
  14| 
  15| # Newline-separated package output from go list is safe
shard

mise-tasks/test/ci/integration/shard:1-80
  1| #!/bin/sh
  2| #MISE description="Run one shard of the integration test package with race detection"
  3| #USAGE arg "<shard>" help="Shard name (a, b, c)"
  4| 
  5| set -eu
  6| 
  7| shard="${usage_shard:-}"
  8| parallel="${GO_TEST_PARALLEL:-16}"
  9| pkg="./cmd/entire/cli/integration_test"
  10| 
  11| case "$shard" in
  12|   a|b|c) ;;
  13|   *)
  14|     echo "error: shard must be one of a, b, c" >&2
  15|     exit 1
  16|     ;;
  17| esac
